The '''Siege of Kyrska''' was an intense three-month-long siege on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kyrska]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The fighting was dragged out due to the high number of house-to-house campaigns. During the battle, a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends#3rd Regiment - SpecForce Urban Combat Specialists|Urban Combat Specialist]] pointed out the "Law of Fortifications": ''"It is always as hard to get out as it is to get in"''.<ref name="RoE" />
